positive: A minimalist geometric forest scene featuring stylized deciduous trees and abstract woodland shapes. The trees should have clean, solid silhouettes in complementary earth tones (sage green, burnt orange, deep navy). The foreground should incorporate patterned geometric floor tiles and wandering stylized animal silhouettes (fox, deer) that blend into the foliage. Style: Modern folk art illustration, flat vector aesthetic, high contrast, clean lines, symmetrical composition, ideal for a center apparel print. Lighting: Bright, diffused daylight, soft shadows. Color direction: Muted natural palette with pops of warm jewel tones. High detail, ultra-clean vector art, perfect for screen printing.
